qualifications.name: Bachelor of Science in Engineering in Chemical Engineering
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School: School of Chemical and Metallurgical Engineering.

Additional information: Applicants who achieve Level 6 in English, Mathematics and Physical Sciences generally stand a greater chance of being accepted; Applicants meeting the minimum requirements may be wait-listed.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Architectural Studies
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School: School of Architecture and Planning.

Additional selection criteria: Acceptance depends on departmental selection; Applicants must complete a written and graphic exercise; Applicants may be required to attend an interview; Applicants with a Wits APS of 30-33 may be accepted after an interview on the basis of exceptional scores; Selection is based mainly on performance in the selection exercise, interview and academics; Demographic balance may be considered where applicants score within the same range.

Waitlisting: eligible: True; criteria: APS 30-35; Subject to place availability.
